text.title: Market Research: TAM/SAM/SOM Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Market Research: TAM/SAM/SOM. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Pitch deck cites '$50B TAM' from a 2020 report.
antipattern.root-cause: Author copied a stale headline number.
antipattern.fix: Force retrieval date on every TAM citation; reject reports older than 24 months.
If delta > 30%, write reconciliation paragraph; do not average.

antipattern.symptom: Geography listed as 'global' to inflate TAM.
antipattern.root-cause: Founder pressure for a bigger number.
antipattern.fix: Refuse 'global'; require ISO codes for the actual launch markets.

antipattern.symptom: SOM stated as a single number with no confidence tag.
antipattern.fix: Require high/medium/low + one-line reason; auto-flag in linter.
